sentence_reviews.text: Human evaluation measures quality, preference, usefulness, risk, or experience through controlled studies, rubrics, pairwise comparisons, and expert review.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NIST AI RMF 1.0, Measure and Govern functions covering human oversight, stakeholder input, risk measurement, documentation, and monitoring.
sentence_reviews.notes: Narrowed to human ratings, preference studies, and review practices without claiming broad downstream substrate relationships.

sentence_reviews.text: Human evaluation supplies direct judgments of quality, preference, usability, and risk when automatic metrics are incomplete or misaligned.

sentence_reviews.text: Human ratings can be noisy, biased, expensive, and sensitive to rubric design, sampling, annotator expertise, and aggregation choices.
